# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI pipeline with multiple stages where build artifacts are passed between jobs. The build job creates artifacts (binaries, configs) and deployment jobs download and execute them. Store artifacts for 30 days for team access.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - build
  - deploy
  - rollback

variables:
  ARTIFACTS_EXPIRATION: 30

build:
  stage: build
  script:
    - echo "Building binaries and configs..."
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - binaries/bin
      - config/config.yml
    expire_in: ${ARTIFACTS_EXPIRATION} days

deploy-dev:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl --output binaries/bin -L $CI_JOB_TOKEN@https://gitlab-ci-artifacts.gitlab.io/artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/builds/${BUILD_JOB_NUMBER}
    - curl --output config/config.yml -L $CI_JOB_TOKEN@https://gitlab-ci-artifacts.gitlab.io/artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/config/build/${BUILD_JOB_NUMBER}

deploy-prod:
  stage: deploy
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    - curl --output binaries/bin -L $CI_JOB_TOKEN@https://gitlab-ci-artifacts.gitlab.io/artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/builds/${BUILD_JOB_NUMBER}
    - curl --output config/config.yml -L $CI_JOB_TOKEN@https://gitlab-ci-artifacts.gitlab.io/artifacts/${CI_PROJECT_ID}/config/build/${BUILD_JOB_NUMBER}

rollback:
  stage: rollback
  dependencies:
    - build
  script:
    # Script to roll back deployment
